area_description: Personalization (P13N) in LLMs focuses on adapting model behavior to individual users' preferences, needs, and contexts. There are two different tasks for personalization, along with user modeling as an orthogonal dimension.

categories.name: Conversational Personalization
categories.description: Adapt the model's behavior to the user's conversational style, preferences, and context. Approaches include retrieving from user history or learning user profiles to generate personalized responses.

sub_topics.name: RAG-based Personalization
sub_topics.description: Retrieve relevant memories in the user's history (log, multi-modal memory) and use them to generate personalized responses.

sub_topics.name: User-profile Based Personalization
sub_topics.description: Learn user profiles, which can be text-based or embedding-based, and use them to generate personalized responses.

categories.name: Recommendation Personalization
categories.description: Recommend a list of items to the user, ranking items based on their preferences. Covers LLM-based recommendation approaches, leveraging LLM signals for existing recommendation techniques, and ensuring diversity and serendipity in results.

sub_topics.name: LLM-based Recommendation
sub_topics.description: Using LLMs directly for recommendation, including prompt-based approaches (feeding user history in prompts), post-training (fine-tuning or RL), and generative recommendation with contrastive learning.

sub_topics.name: Leveraging LLM Signals
sub_topics.description: Enhance existing recommendation techniques using LLM-derived signals such as item and user descriptions, embeddings, and synthetic training data.

sub_topics.name: Recommendation Diversity and Serendipity
sub_topics.description: Ensuring recommendation results are diverse and can be related but a bit surprising to the user.

categories.name: User Modeling
categories.description: Building representations of users to capture their preferences and interests. Orthogonal to the personalization tasks above, user modeling underpins both conversational and recommendation personalization.

sub_topics.name: Text Profiles
sub_topics.description: Text-based summaries of a user's preferences, interests, and behavior patterns.

sub_topics.name: Embedding Profiles
sub_topics.description: Dense vector representations capturing user preferences in a continuous embedding space.

sub_topics.name: Graph / Concept-Net Profiles
sub_topics.description: Profiles organized according to a graph or concept-net structure, capturing interesting concepts and their relationships.
